title: VirtualSpawnerPro
description: The Ultimate High-Performance Spawner Solution for 1.21+
body:
## 🚀 VirtualSpawnerPro (VSP)
**The Ultimate High-Performance Spawner Solution for 1.21+**

VirtualSpawnerPro is a professional-grade plugin designed to eliminate entity-related server lag while providing a deep, engaging progression system for your players. By "virtualizing" mob spawners, VSP processes loot and XP internally via a tiered GUI system, removing the need for hundreds of entities and complex hopper clocks that kill your TPS.

---

## 💎 Key Features

### ⚡ Tiered Speed Progression
* **10 Levels of Speed:** Allow players to upgrade their spawners using in-game currency.
* **Dynamic Tick Rates:** Higher levels reduce the time between "kill cycles," allowing for faster resource generation.
* **Stack Multipliers:** Upgrade costs automatically scale based on the number of spawners in a stack, ensuring a balanced economy.

### 📦 Multi-Page Virtual Storage
* **Hopper-Free Design:** Loot goes directly into the spawner's internal storage.
* **Expandable Capacity:** Players can unlock up to **4 full pages** of storage via the upgrade menu.
* **Anti-Overflow:** Integrated "Sell All" logic ensures storage never stays full for long.

### 📉 Smart Stacking & Performance
* **Block Stacking:** Players can stack identical spawners by simply placing them on top of each other while sneaking.
* **Holographic Displays:** Uses high-performance **Text Displays** (Native 1.21) to show spawner type and stack count (e.g., `x25 Iron Golem`).
* **Async Processing:** Calculations are handled off the main server thread to ensure zero impact on your game loop.

### 💰 Built-in Economy Integration
* **Vault Supported:** Works out of the box with your existing economy.
* **Sell GUI:** A dedicated sell button in the storage menu allows players to liquidate their loot instantly based on your custom prices.

---

## 🛠️ Administrative & Config Power

### 📝 Fully Modular Configuration
* **`drops.yml`**: Define specific drops, percentages (down to 0.001%), and min/max amount ranges for every mob type.
* **`prices.yml`**: Control your server's economy by setting custom sell prices for every material.
* **Blacklist Support**: Easily block certain mobs (like the Warden or Ender Dragon) from being virtualized.
* **Live Reloading**: Use `/vsp reload` to apply changes to all three config files instantly without a server restart.

---

## 🔑 Permissions & Commands

### **Commands**
| Command | Description | Aliases |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `/vsp give <player> <mob> [amt] [speed] [storage]` | Give a custom spawner item | `/vspawnerpro`, `/vs` |
| `/vsp reload` | Reloads all configuration files | `/vs reload` |

### **Permission Nodes**
| Node | Description | Default |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `vspawner.admin` | Full access to commands and bypasses costs | OP |
| `vspawner.silk-bypass` | Mine spawners without Silk Touch | OP |
| `vspawner.speed.<1-10>` | Access to specific speed upgrade levels | Level 1: True |
| `vspawner.storage.<1-4>` | Access to specific storage page unlocks | Level 1: True |

---
